sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9272" key="a)/norgos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄνοργος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9272.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not wrathful,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:385" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">385</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
